mapper.sql: select a.asset_id, a.market_id, m.market_code, m.market_name, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, a.asset_type, a.quote_code, a.quote_enabled, a.status, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark from fin_asset a left join fin_market m on m.market_id = a.market_id
mapper.select: where a.del_flag = '0' and a.status = '0' order by a.asset_name asc
where a.del_flag = '0' and a.status = '0' and a.quote_enabled = '1' order by a.asset_id asc
where a.market_id = #{marketId} and a.asset_code = #{assetCode} and a.del_flag = '0' limit 1
